name: diagGetParameterCoded, diagSetParameterCoded
title: diagGetParameterCoded, diagSetParameterCoded
syntax: long diagGetParameterCoded(diagResponse obj, char parameterName[], byte* buffer, dword bufferSize)
description: Sets or specifies the value of a parameter directly via coded data bytes.
return: 0 if bytes were copied, otherwise <0 for an error code.
